scraped.title: Mediterranean Salad
scraped.description: With crisp veggies, salty feta, hearty chickpeas and a bright lemon vinaigrette, this easy Mediterranean salad recipe is so full of flavor!

ingredients.name: arugula (spinach, or mixed greens of choice)
(15-ounce) can reduced sodium chickpeas (rinsed and drained)
cucumber (halved lengthwise, seeded, and sliced 1/4-inch thick (heaping 1 cup))
red bell pepper (cut into 1/2-inch dice (1 heaping cup))

steps: Place the red onion in a small bowl and cover with cold water. Let sit at least 5 minutes, then drain (this removes some of the harsh bite).
Place the arugula in a large bowl and drizzle lightly with the dressing. Toss to coat.
Add the cucumber, cherry tomatoes, bell pepper, chickpeas, and drained red onion. Drizzle with a little more dressing then toss gently to combine.
Last, add 3/4 of the feta, and toss very gently. Add salt and pepper to taste. Sprinkle the remaining feta over the top. Divide between serving bowls and serve with additional dressing as desired.
